name: hestia-observe
description: Hestia observe-only adapter for a foreign member (Kimi Code). Registers the session and streams acts to Hestia's observation log to grow a behavioral baseline. Installs standing law via AGENTS.md. NO blocking by default — it wires ZERO blocking-capable hooks in this manifest; blocking is the Phase-1 gate (hooks/pre_tool_use.py), wired separately.
author: dp-web4 / Hestia

interface.shortDescription: Foreign-agent onboarding observer — no blocking, Phase 0
